calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-15-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Scott Hughes, CSR #12365.

David V. Marcolini, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
No appearance by defendant Tony Loi.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 14, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, November 15, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against defendant Tony Loi as follows:

Principal - $3,394.82.
Interest - $407.38.
Attorney Fees - $660.00.
Costs - $263.00.

Total - $4,725.20.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-15-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Set For Trial On Nov-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
